title: ATP_microplate_settings
steps: Sign up for the microplate when planning the experiment and power on before ~15 minutes of use
Mix your samples and reagents in the microplate following the manufacturer’s protocol

Start a new protocol Select Plate type Check box- Use Lid Set temperature Shake 1. Shake mode –eg. Orbital 2. Shake duration-eg. 15 seconds Read 1. Detection method- Luminescence 2. Read type- Endpoint/Kinetic 3. Optics type- Filters --------Filter set- Green; Integration time- 1sec, click full plate and select wells you want to read
creator: Eadewunm
